title: Login page not loading
description: User cannot access the login page from the homepage.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Customer tried resetting password but did not receive the email.

title: Payment failed during checkout
description: Transaction fails when paying with credit card.

title: Profile picture upload error
description: Users cannot upload profile images larger than 1MB.

title: Search feature not returning results
description: Search bar returns empty results for valid queries.

title: Mobile layout broken
description: Website layout overlaps on small mobile screens.

title: Notification settings not saving
description: User changes notification settings but they revert after refresh.

title: Slow dashboard loading
description: Dashboard takes more than 10 seconds to load.

title: Unable to download invoice
description: Invoice download button does not respond.

title: Error 500 on settings page
description: Internal server error appears when opening settings.

title: Email notifications delayed
description: Users receive notification emails hours later.

title: Account deletion not working
description: Delete account button does not remove user account.
